---
name: Support question
about: Ask a usage question, deployment question, or request clarification
title: "[Question]: "
labels: ["question", "triage"]
assignees: []
---

### Question

A clear, specific question. The more context you give us, the better we can
answer.

### What I Have Tried

Anything you have already read, run, or tried. Links to docs you consulted
are very helpful.

### Environment (if relevant)

- Service version / commit SHA
- Deployment target (testnet / mainnet)
- Node.js version
- x402 enabled?
- A specific endpoint, SDK method, or metric you are asking about

### Checklist

- [ ] I have read the [README](https://github.com/sachncs/agent-passport#readme).
- [ ] I have searched [existing issues](https://github.com/sachncs/agent-passport/issues?q=is%3Aissue)
      and the [docs/](https://github.com/sachncs/agent-passport/tree/master/docs).
